title: Art in Focus: Q&A with MFA candidate Mark Almanza
summary_en: Mark Almanza is an interdisciplinary artist who works across a variety of mediums to explore their Chicano identity. Their MFA thesis exhibition, “Don’t Everybody Like The Smell Of Gasoline?” will be on view April 21–26 in UW–Madison’s Art Lofts Gallery.
title_cn: 艺术聚焦：艺术硕士候选人马克·阿尔曼萨专访

title: UW–Madison research reveals experiences of HMoob (Hmong) undergraduates across Universities of Wisconsin
summary_en: An updated statistical portrait of HMoob (Hmong) American undergraduates enrolled in the 13 campuses of the Universities of Wisconsin reveals a college experience marked by unique challenges and opportunities.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校发布威斯康星大学系统苗族本科生就读情况研究报告

title: Tandem Press honored by Print Center New York
summary_en: UW–Madison’s Tandem Press is being honored for its significant contributions to the field of printmaking at Print Center New York's spring benefit on May 11.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校坦登出版社获纽约版画中心表彰

title: UW–Madison’s Shanahan co-authors feature article in SDC Journal
summary_en: UW–Madison’s Ann M. Shanahan, a professor of acting and directing in the School of Education’s Department of Theatre and Drama, is the co-author of a feature article in the winter 2026 issue of SDC Journal’s peer-reviewed section.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校学者沙纳汉合著文章刊发于《舞台导演与编舞协会期刊》

title: School of Education student Benjamin Lebovitz receives campus Graduate Peer Mentor Award
summary_en: UW–Madison doctoral student Benjamin Lebovitz was selected as a recipient of the Graduate Peer Mentor Award at the 2026 Bucky’s Awards Ceremony on April 12. Lebovitz is a PhD student in the School of Education’s Department of Educational Leadership and Policy Analysis (ELPA).
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校教育学院学生本杰明·莱博维茨获校级研究生同伴导师奖
